name: Textured Ceramic Accent Lamp Cream - Threshold™: Herringbone Pattern, No Bulb Included, UL Listed
description:
Style and function come together in the Textured Ceramic Accent Lamp from Threshold™ to bring incandescent style to any space in your home. Combining a rounded cream-colored base decorated with a herringbone pattern and silver hardware, this lamp is capped off with a simple, natural lampshade for complete elegance. Pair with a wide variety of furniture styles for a versatile indoor lighting option you'll love. This lamp is available for purchase with or without a bulb.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
